title: 1x Square Silicone Reusable Air Fryer Liner - 19cm - Grey - Greaseproof Baking Parchment Airfryer Tower Tray Inserts Accessories Sheets - By Ashley
features: This square liner is non-stick; high temperature resistant; reusable scratch, abrasion, tear & dirt resistant; not easily deformed which makes it more eco-friendly & is dishwasher safe.
It is ideal for use in an air fryer, plus microwave, oven & steamer.
